risks.name: arc incoherence risk
risks.why: Arc lifecycle transitions are deterministic and verified by dedicated engine tests plus storyline umbrella execution.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Continue adding scenario fixtures as new arc patterns are introduced.

risks.name: chapter progression brittleness risk
risks.why: Progression logic is verified, but blocker/readiness behavior can still be sensitive to edge-case input distributions.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Add curated regression fixtures for chapter transition edge cases in the next maintenance cycle.

risks.name: pressure overreach risk
risks.why: Pressure is bounded and non-overriding by test, but weighting behavior can still drift qualitatively in downstream generation prompts.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Track pressure-to-output drift signals during integration runs and recalibrate category weights if needed.

risks.name: branch explosion / governance failure risk
risks.why: Governance limits and reconvergence recommendations are enforced and validated through deterministic tests.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Add higher-depth synthetic branch tree tests when branch complexity increases.

risks.name: epistemic leakage risk
risks.why: Reader-facing separation and truth firewall checks pass in strict flows; author/debug explainability is isolated from reader payloads.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Preserve explicit reader-surface exclusion tests whenever explainability payloads evolve.

risks.name: storyline bundle boundedness risk
risks.why: Bundle capping and bounded outputs are enforced by orchestrator and wiring tests.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Keep cap assertions in place and add drift checks if additional fields are introduced.

risks.name: verification blind-spot risk
risks.why: Chunk 8 reduced blind spots with verify:storyline and strict-flow inclusion, but test quality remains tied to subsystem fixture depth.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Expand subsystem fixture diversity and periodically review storyline umbrella membership.

risks.name: maintainability/ownership risk
risks.why: Verification surface is now broad and explicit, but ongoing ownership discipline is required to keep command mappings and docs synchronized.
risks.recommendedNextAction: Assign routine ownership for storyline verification docs and command map updates during release prep.
